redaction.pii: replace with [REDACTED] and store sha512 of original in *_hash fields
redaction.secrets: never store plaintext secrets; store only hashes and context hints

data_usage.note: Provider contractually prohibited from using submitted data for model training or fine-tuning.

access_control.revocation_method: API key invalidation via admin portal or emergency kill switch endpoint

limitations: This demo VDP does not prove environment integrity (no hardware attestation).
It proves package integrity and signer identity when signed.
